title: Global Times: Head-of-state diplomacy shines at WAIC, fostering ties and advancing global governance consensus
description: BEIJING, July 18, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Chinese President Xi Jinping on Friday held a series of high-level meetings on the sidelines of the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC) and High-Level Meeting on Global AI Governance in Shanghai, sitting down successively with Thai Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul, Cambodian Prime Minister Hun Manet, and UN Secretary-General António Guterres. The bustling diplomatic activity transformed the WAIC from a premier showcase of AI technologies and industrial breakthroughs into a vibrant platform for head-of-state diplomacy and global governance coordination.

title: WeRide Named Among China's Top 10 AI Case Studies for UAE Autonomous Driving Deployment, the Only Autonomous Driving Company Recognized
description: SHANGHAI, July 17, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- WeRide (NASDAQ: WRD; HKEX: 0800), a global leader in autonomous driving technology, today announced that its autonomous driving deployment in the United Arab Emirates (UAE) has been selected as one of the Top 10 examples of international cooperation in Chinese AI technologies and products in AI From China Benefits the World (2026), in a national case collection released at the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC).

title: Scale can measure university students' confidence in using AI
description: A study conducted at Koç University School of Nursing examined university students' perceived self-efficacy in using artificial intelligence technologies. Led by Associate Professor Remziye Semerci Şahin and Assistant Professor Seda Güney, the researchers adapted the Artificial Intelligence Self-Efficacy Scale (AISES) into Turkish and evaluated its psychometric properties. The study was published in the International Journal of Human–Computer Interaction.

title: Mets among teams who used AI loophole with dugout iPads
description: The Mets were among the teams found to have exploited a loophole regarding the use of artificial intelligence for in-game decisions.
content:
The Mets were among the teams found to have exploited a loophole regarding the use of artificial intelligence for in-game decisions during the first half of the season, sources told The Post.

title: Joyson Electronics Unveils Embodied AI Core Component Portfolio, Including Dexterous Robotic Hand and Solid-Liquid Hybrid Battery, at WAIC 2026
description: SHANGHAI, July 17, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Joyson Electronics (600699.SH/0699.HK) announced at the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC) a suite of robotic component solutions, including a dexterous robotic hand, solid-liquid hybrid battery, third-generation AI head assembly, electronic skin, and an embodied AI brain - alongside its latest achievements in industrial settings training and application. In addition, the company's robot controller products are already in volume production and being delivered to leading robotics firms.

title: Leather jacket worn by Nvidia CEO goes for just under $1 million at Sotheby's auction
description: The high price for the garment is a sign that collectors are looking to bid on artifacts and collectibles from the artificial intelligence boom.
content:
Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang is rarely seen without his leather jacket. It's his signature look. He's been wearing them for nearly 20 years.

title: SBS Japanese Weekly News Wrap Saturday 18 July
description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese this week unveiled a new national regulatory framework for the Artificial Intelligence industry. United Nations is again urging all parties to de-escalate and return to diplomacy in the ongoing conflict between Iran and the United States in the Middle East. And following the child sexual abuse case at a Sydney childcare centre, the Australian Federal Police are appealing for information to help identify potential victims. Recorded 17 July.

title: Sailing the Stormy Seas of AI
description: Delve into the reality of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and learn why skepticism is essential for its future impacts on business.
content:
Forecasts of AI’s future impacts must be viewed with skepticism, as AI and its promoters are adept at saying what we want to hear rather than telling us the discomfiting truth, as the truth might prompt us to turn AI off.
